zh.lifeSummary: 當Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan於大約1160年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷時，他的父親Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré41歲，母親Emma de Dinan25歲。他於大約1190年與Clémence de Fougères結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1197年在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫迪南享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan于大约1160年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷时，他的父亲Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré41岁，母亲Emma de Dinan25岁。他于大约1190年与Clémence de Fougères结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1197年在法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫迪南享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vitre,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico and Argentina): adaptation of a surname such as Greek   Mitropoulos   and Italian   Mitri  .
Albanian and Romanian: from the personal name Mitre, a short form of Albanian Dhimitër, Romanian Dumitru, from classical Greek Dēmētrios (see Dimitris ).

variants.name: Mitropoulos
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the personal name Mitros + the ending -poulos (from Latin pullus ‘nestling, chick’), which occurs chiefly in the Peloponnese. Compare Metropoulos .

nameMeanings.name: Alain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton form of Alan, now common in all parts of France. See Alan .

en.lifeSummary: When Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan was born about 1160, in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré, was 41 and his mother, Emma de Dinan, was 25. He married Clémence de Fougères about 1190. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1197, in Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan est né environ 1160, à Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Emma de Dinan, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Clémence de Fougères environ 1190. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1197, à Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan um 1160 in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré 41 und seine Mutter Emma de Dinan 25. Er hat um 1190 Clémence de Fougères geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1197 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan è nato il circa 1160 nel Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Dinan, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Clémence de Fougères circa 1190. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1197, nel Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinanが約1160年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインヴィトルeで生まれた時，父Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitréは41歳，母Emma de Dinanは25歳であった。約1190年にClémence de Fougèresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1197年にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーディナンで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan(이)가 대략 1160년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 비트e에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Dinan(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1190년 Clémence de Fougères(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1197년 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 딘아에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan nasceu aproximadamente 1160, em Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Dinan, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Clémence de Fougères aproximadamente 1190. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1197, em Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan родился около 1160 г. в местности витрe, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Emma de Dinan, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Clémence de Fougères около 1190 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1197 г. в местности динан, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan nació aproximadamente 1160, en Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Robert de Vitré, III, Seigneur of Vitré, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Emma de Dinan, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Clémence de Fougères aproximadamente 1190. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1197, en Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 38 años.
